bead.title: bench-pr-A2: shell harness adapters and task executor contract
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The parent PR A runner cannot remove host Python until the matrix-side harness adapter flow is available as shell scripts with a stable JSON stdin/stdout contract.

ROOT CAUSE
cmd/bench/matrix.go:1105 puts the repo root on host PYTHONPATH so Harbor can import scripts.benchmark.harbor_adapters.*, coupling benchmark execution to host Python. The parent scope requires porting matrix-side Python harness_adapters/ to shell harness-adapters/ and having scripts/benchmark/benchmark invoke harness-adapters/<name> with profile.json on stdin to produce command-spec.json.

PROPOSED FIX
Create scripts/benchmark/harness-adapters/ shell adapter entrypoints for the PR A smoke matrix, including the harbor adapter contract. Implement adapter discovery for scripts/benchmark/benchmark harness-adapters. Define and validate JSON stdin/stdout fields for profile.json -> command-spec.json. Compose the task-spec shape consumed by task-executors/<name> from the planned cell, profile, task, and command-spec, but use a local fake task executor in tests rather than Docker. Add tests proving adapter invocation, malformed JSON failures, command-spec creation, task-spec composition, and no reliance on host PYTHONPATH.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement the full per-cell lifecycle, resume/rerun policy, flock concurrency, process group signal handling, docker stop cleanup, harbor-runner Docker image, or real Harbor container execution in this child. Do not remove cmd/bench/matrix.go unless needed only to route to the new script behind existing commands. Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it. Governing artifact reference must remain governing:plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification. Parent/dependency ID fizeau-11e9c095 must remain traceable. Verification requirements cd cli && go test ./... and lefthook run pre-commit are required gates.

AC
1. TestHarnessAdapterDiscovery: scripts/benchmark/benchmark harness-adapters lists the shell harness-adapters available for PR A smoke execution.
2. TestHarnessAdapterCommandSpec: harness-adapters/harbor reads profile.json from stdin and emits deterministic command-spec.json with required fields.
3. TestHarnessAdapterRejectsInvalidInput: malformed or schema-invalid profile JSON exits non-zero with a useful stderr message and no partial command-spec success.
4. TestBenchmarkTaskSpecComposition: the runner composes task-spec JSON from planned cell data plus command-spec and passes it to task-executors/<name> on stdin.
5. TestBenchmarkNoHostPythonPathAdapterFlow: adapter execution does not require repo-root PYTHONPATH or host Python imports from scripts.benchmark.harbor_adapters.*.
6. TestBenchmarkVerificationGatesA2: cd cli && go test ./... passes.
7. TestBenchmarkLefthookGateA2: lefthook run pre-commit passes.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestHarnessAdapterDiscovery passes.
2. TestHarnessAdapterCommandSpec passes.
3. TestHarnessAdapterRejectsInvalidInput passes.
4. TestBenchmarkTaskSpecComposition passes.
5. TestBenchmarkNoHostPythonPathAdapterFlow passes.
6. TestBenchmarkVerificationGatesA2: cd cli && go test ./... passes.
7. TestBenchmarkLefthookGateA2: lefthook run pre-commit passes.
